title: Pears And Oranges
description: A mod that adds pears and oranges to the game!
body:
The mod adds two new fruits, oranges and pears. They drop from oak trees alongside apples.

![Oak Tree fruit drops.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wlhyxasY/images/14d5d5491d20647aae2ec092ae30fe20c23b5efa.png)

Huge thanks to my wifey for helping me with the textures.
